ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "subj" INTEGER /* Subject number */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition under which the experiment was conducted */,
  "delcond" INTEGER /* Delaying condition for the experiment */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* A descriptive name for the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date and time when the experiment ended */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this trial belongs to */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number in the sequence */,
  "target_number" INTEGER /* Target number for the trial */,
  "movedur" REAL /* Duration of movement during the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* The start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* The end time of the trial */,
  "trial_duration" REAL /* Total duration of the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction metric record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial this metric belongs to */,
  "react1_dist" REAL /* Distance for the first reaction */,
  "react1_vel" REAL /* Velocity for the first reaction */,
  "pathltar" REAL /* Path length for the target */,
  "react2_dist" REAL /* Distance for the second reaction */,
  "react2_vel" REAL /* Velocity for the second reaction */,
  "react3_dist" REAL /* Distance for the third reaction */,
  "react3_vel" REAL /* Velocity for the third reaction */,
  "reaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the reaction metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_data" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement data record */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial this movement data belongs to */,
  "endpt_vel" REAL /* Velocity at the endpoint of the trial */,
  "missangle" REAL /* Angle of the miss if applicable */,
  "avevel_target" REAL /* Average velocity towards the target */,
  "start_angle" REAL /* Angle at the start of the movement */,
  "end_angle" REAL /* Angle at the end of the movement */,
  "max_velocity" REAL /* Maximum velocity during the movement */,
  "min_velocity" REAL /* Minimum velocity during the movement */,
  "movement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the movement data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "subj" INTEGER /* Subject number corresponding to the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the participant */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "participation_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_subj FOREIGN KEY ("subj") REFERENCES experiments ("subj")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the system */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who created the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the condition was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, lab assistant, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "experiment_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who created the experiment condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment condition was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
